breakdown: This PR refactors rewards box normalization to use a centralized robust numeric converter (`_DNC.convert_value`) with fallback chains. Key improvement is the `_get_raw` helper that searches multiple key aliases to find finite non-zero values. Tests cover both unit and E2E scenarios. Minor concerns: `Any` type used in `_get_raw`, and reliance on default values rather than explicit error handling patterns.
key_changes: Added `_get_raw` helper function for multi-key fallback extraction
Added robust handling for NaN/infinite float values in fallbacks
Added `testing_mcp/test_rewards_box_robustness.py` E2E test covering messy LLM outputs
Added WHY comment documenting LLM boolean representation issue
